---
title: "Botany"
toc: false
---

## Slides

- [Day 1: Guidance](day1/index.qmd)

- [Day 2: Topic 2](day2/index.qmd)

- [Day 3: Topic 3](day3/index.qmd)

- [Day 4: Topic 4](day4/index.qmd)

- [Day 5: Topic 5](day5/index.qmd)

- [Day 6: Topic 6](day6/index.qmd)

- [Day 7: Topic 7](day7/index.qmd)

- [On-Demand: Self-Paced Content](on-demand/index.qmd)


## Important Dates

- Day 1: [Date TBD]
- Day 2: [Date TBD]
- Day 3: [Date TBD]
- Day 4: [Date TBD]
- Day 5: [Date TBD]
- Day 6: [Date TBD]
- Day 7: [Date TBD]

-->

## Office Hours

By appointment, please send an email to [joelnitta@chiba-u.jp]

## Links

- [Syllabus](https://syllabus.gs.chiba-u.jp/2026/401001000000000/G15N945001/en_US)

- [Moodle](https://moodle.gs.chiba-u.jp/moodle/course/view.php?id=48588)
